title: Cry in Dubai
full_title: Cry in Dubai by 24hrs & DJ JAM (JPN) (Ft. LEX (JPN))
lyrics:
[Verse 1: 24hrs]
(DJ JAM [?])
Yeah
We don't wanna go too far
In love with fast cars
I made her a promise to get new Ferrari
I swear she the baddest, she look like a Barbie
She made me a promise, she always would call me
It was me and my lady, AMG the Mercedez
She on my mind now, she drivin' me crazy
Swear that I'm impressed now
She said "Twenty, I like you and LEX now"
Okay, okay, 24hrs, oh

[Verse 2: LEX]
[?] I keep a hunnid racks
[?] Prada
[?] yeah
[?] yeah
[?] 24hrs
[?]

[Chorus: 24hrs, LEX]
She don't wanna cry in Dubai (cry in Dubai)
She don't wanna cry in Dubai (cry in Dubai)
She would just rather be high (cry in Dubai)
She don't wanna cry in Dubai (cry in Dubai)
She don't wanna cry in Dubai (yeah, cry in Dubai)
She don't wanna cry in Dubai ([?])

[Verse 3: 24hrs]
Last night, we stayed up until 5 AM so we can watch the sunrise
She said "Twenty, let me tell you when you at your best"
"When JAM is on the beat, and you feature LEX"
More weed, less stress, less stress
More weed, less stress, less stress
